goal: Phase 05 — lexicon hygiene: split stop-words by purpose (NAMING_DETECTION_STOPWORDS vs PROFILE_ANALYSIS_STOPWORDS); wire into imposters and sprawl; vendor v1.2.0 dogfood snapshot first so before/after deltas are measurable on a stable corpus.
